title: Warīsān heat wave
lead: Warīsān is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.03. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing health risks to residents.
body:
The heat wave in Warīsān has resulted in a high CDD of 9.6 GG, indicating extremely hot conditions. 
 The relative humidity is at 47%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 9.7 km/h may provide some relief, but the overall conditions remain critical.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect residents and infrastructure.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to extreme heat
